> [!important]
> **One change per PR.** Scope to a single component or section — not a whole page. Split unrelated changes into separate PRs.

<!-- Select exactly one. -->

- [ ] feat

- [ ] Tested on desktop (≥1024px)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] No regressions on affected routes
